main.description: One participant's state for a single interactive element within a playhtml room. The record key SHOULD be a stable hash of (room + elementId) so repeated writes overwrite (last-write-wins) instead of accruing. Fits discrete, last-write-ish capabilities (can-move, can-toggle, can-spin, can-grow); genuinely concurrent collaborative values should stay in the live CRDT layer.

room.description: Room id, e.g. "playhtml.fun" (domain scope) or "playhtml.fun-/page" (path scope).

elementId.description: The element's DOM id, unique within the room.

capability.description: Capability/tag this state belongs to, e.g. "can-move", "can-toggle", "can-play".

data.description: Capability-specific JSON state for this element (e.g. {"x":12,"y":40} for can-move).
